stories.title: 微软2025年碳排放量增加25%，达3400万公吨
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
stories.summary: 微软2026年可持续发展报告显示，其2025年碳排放量同比增加25%，总计3400万公吨，表明公司可能再次难以实现气候目标。
stories.analysis: 这暴露了AI算力扩张与绿色承诺之间的直接矛盾，微软需在增长与环保间找到平衡。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. As reported by GeekWire, the report states that Microsoft's carbon emissions increased 25 percent in 2025, totalling 34 million metric to

stories.title: OpenAI AGI负责人Fidji Simo因病离职，转为兼职顾问
stories.sourceTitle: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
stories.summary: Fidji Simo在X上宣布辞去OpenAI AGI负责人的全职职务，因病情超出预期，将转为兼职顾问，这一领导真空在OpenAI筹备IPO和追赶Anthropic之际出现。
stories.analysis: 高层变动可能延缓OpenAI的AGI路线图，并影响投资者信心。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a

stories.title: Google将在广告中心标注“由AI创建或编辑”标签
stories.sourceTitle: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
stories.summary: Google在“我的广告中心”新增标签，用户可在Google搜索、Discover和YouTube上查看广告是否使用AI制作或编辑，该更新于周四宣布。
stories.analysis: 此举提高了广告透明度，但可能不足以阻止误导性AI广告，仍需更强监管。
stories.sourceExcerpt: You can see if ads on Google Search, Google Discover, and YouTube were made or edited using AI from a new section in Google's "My Ad Center," as reported earlier by TechCrunch. The update, announced on Thursday, adds a "created or edited with AI" label under t

stories.title: 微软利用AI提前发现漏洞，周二补丁日将包含更多安全更新
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft’s patch Tuesdays are about to get bigger
stories.summary: 微软在博文中表示，正在使用AI更早识别潜在问题，未来Windows 11更新将包含更高数量的安全修复，影响用户更新体验。
stories.analysis: AI辅助安全虽能提前修复漏洞，但累积更多补丁可能增加系统重启频率和兼容性风险。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Windows 11 updates could soon include fixes for more security issues at once. Microsoft said in a blog post on Thursday that it's now using AI to "identify potential issues earlier," which means "customers will see a higher volume of security updates included

stories.title: OpenAI确认GPT-5.6是Microsoft Copilot的首选模型，否认分手传闻
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot amid breakup chatter
stories.summary: OpenAI表示其新模型系列将继续为微软的生产力应用提供动力，GPT-5.6是Copilot的首选模型，澄清了关于两家公司关系破裂的传言。
stories.analysis: 这一声明稳定了市场预期，表明OpenAI与微软的深度绑定仍未动摇。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.

stories.title: OpenAI二号人物Fidji Simo因医疗假超期辞职
stories.sourceTitle: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
stories.summary: Fidji Simo因医疗假超预期而辞去OpenAI第二号高管职务，正值公司考虑IPO并与Anthropic在企业市场展开竞争的关键时刻。
stories.analysis: 领导层真空可能打乱OpenAI的IPO节奏，并加剧内部战略不确定性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterpri

stories.title: ChatGPT浏览器Atlas上线不到一年即宣告关闭
stories.sourceTitle: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
stories.summary: OpenAI宣布关闭其AI浏览器Atlas，该产品于去年10月发布，能代表用户执行任务，但公司确认将部分代理浏览功能迁移至桌面应用和Chrome扩展。
stories.analysis: 独立浏览器模式失败，但OpenAI仍押注代理功能嵌入现有平台，策略转向务实。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it. Atlas was announced in October, but as part of its wave of news about ChatGPT Work today, the company confirmed that it

stories.title: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6模型家族，声称在网络安全等领域性能提升
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
stories.summary: OpenAI推出GPT-5.6新模型系列，在网络安全等多个方面带来改进，标志着模型能力的又一次升级。
stories.analysis: GPT-5.6的发布有助于OpenAI在安全和性能竞赛中维持领先，但实际效果需经第三方验证。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

stories.title: AI代理初创公司Lyzr让自家代理主导1亿美元融资过程
stories.sourceTitle: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
stories.summary: 企业AI代理初创公司Lyzr使用自己的AI代理完成了1亿美元融资，以此证明产品实际有效。
stories.analysis: 这不仅是营销噱头，也展示了AI代理在复杂商业谈判中的潜力，但实际执行仍需人类监督。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.

stories.title: OpenAI关闭Atlas但AI浏览器野心未减，功能移至桌面应用和Chrome扩展
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
stories.summary: OpenAI在关停Atlas后，将部分代理浏览功能整合到桌面应用和Chrome扩展中，继续推进AI浏览器能力。
stories.analysis: 这表明OpenAI在浏览器领域采取更轻量化的策略，通过插件而非独立产品渗透用户日常使用场景。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.

stories.title: Elon Musk称赞Mythos/Fable，承诺不会“切断”Anthropic
stories.sourceTitle: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
stories.summary: 在约400亿美元收入面临风险的背景下，Elon Musk称赞Mythos/Fable，并保证不会切断对Anthropic模型托管的支持。
stories.analysis: Musk的承诺暂时缓解了Anthropic的依赖风险，但长期来看，与竞争平台的合作仍然脆弱。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Should Anthropic trust Elon Musk to host its models? With about $40 billion in revenue at stake, Musk insists that the company can.

stories.title: AI能否回答“3万亿美元”的投资回报问题？
stories.sourceTitle: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
stories.summary: 关于AI投资回报率的讨论再次升温，这次涉及的金额更大，后果也可能更严重。
stories.analysis: AI ROI辩论的升级意味着资本正在重新评估投入产出比，可能影响未来融资和定价策略。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The AI ROI debate has returned and the numbers are even bigger, as are, perhaps, the consequences.

stories.title: NVIDIA成为自己创建的算力市场的受害者
stories.sourceTitle: Nvidia is a victim of the compute marketplace it created
stories.summary: NVIDIA证明了算力的巨大价值，却发现自己处于一个人人都想参与的市场中心，而更简单的技术和不太有趣的公司却在边缘获利。
stories.analysis: 这揭示了基础设施提供商的困境：价值被上下游侵蚀，NVIDIA需寻找新的差异化壁垒。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Having proven how valuable compute can be, the company finds itself at the center of a market everyone wants to be in — while simpler technologies and less interesting companies get rich on the sidelines.

stories.title: 获政府批准后OpenAI正式发布GPT-5.6，同时推出“ChatGPT Work”
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’
stories.summary: 在GPT-5.6因监管风波仅限政府组织预览两周后，特朗普政府批准其公开部署，OpenAI同时宣布了面向企业的新产品“ChatGPT Work”。
stories.analysis: 监管放行与新品同步推出，表明OpenAI在合规框架下加速商业化，但未来仍面临政策不确定性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: About two weeks after OpenAI's GPT-5.6 was caught up in regulatory drama - rolled out only to government-approved organizations during a "limited preview" period - the company has received the Trump administration's greenlight for a public rollout of the model

stories.title: 纽约时报指控OpenAI在ChatGPT版权案中隐藏证据
stories.sourceTitle: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
stories.summary: 新闻出版商指控OpenAI隐藏了可能识别ChatGPT输出中侵权新闻内容的工具和数据集，并提交新的制裁动议，升级诉讼。
stories.analysis: 若指控成立，OpenAI将面临更严厉的法律制裁，并可能动摇其数据获取合法性基础。
stories.sourceExcerpt: News publishers say OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs, escalating their lawsuit with a new motion for sanctions.

stories.title: 政府如何判断OpenAI前沿模型可安全发布？
stories.sourceTitle: How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
stories.summary: 报道指出，政府与Anthropic和OpenAI之间的具体对话细节尚不明确，引发对安全审查过程的质疑。
stories.analysis: 审查缺乏透明度可能削弱公众信任，未来或需建立更公开的评估标准。
stories.sourceExcerpt: "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."

stories.title: Character.AI推出c.ai Series短剧系列，进军微短剧市场
stories.sourceTitle: Character.AI wants a piece of the microdrama pie
stories.summary: Character.AI宣布推出c.ai Series——可观看和互动的短剧视频，标志着其从聊天机器人平台向互动视听内容拓展。
stories.analysis: 这反映了AI角色扮演平台向娱乐化、视频化转型的趋势，但盈利模式仍待验证。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Character.AI's plan to become more than just an LLM-powered chatbot platform is going beyond interactive books, comics, and audio dramas. Today, the company announced the debut of c.ai Series - short-form, episodic videos designed to be watched and interacted

stories.title: Meta携Muse Spark 1.1进入拥挤的AI编程战场
stories.sourceTitle: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
stories.summary: Meta推出Muse Spark 1.1，主打处理大型代理工作负载、修复bug和协助大规模代码迁移，面向企业自动化需求。
stories.analysis: Meta的入场加剧了AI编码工具的竞争，其开源策略可能吸引开发者生态，但需差异化优势。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations — the kind of automation that enterprises are increasingly turning to AI companies to provide.

stories.title: Google将披露哪些广告由AI制作
stories.sourceTitle: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
stories.summary: Google此前仅要求选举广告披露AI使用情况，现在扩展至所有广告，禁止误导性内容，但仍允许AI生成或修改的广告存在。
stories.analysis: 此举在透明度上迈进一步，但效果取决于用户是否关注标签以及标签的准确性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose.

stories.title: 巴黎AI语音初创公司Gradium获1亿美元种子轮融资，NVIDIA参投
stories.sourceTitle: Paris-based AI voice startup Gradium raises $100M seed, backed by Nvidia
stories.summary: Gradium利用资金在湾设立办事处以争夺AI人才，加强其在全球领先AI生态系统中的核心地位。
stories.analysis: 高昂的种子轮融资凸显AI语音赛道的热度，但湾区的竞争和成本对其扩张构成挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The company is using the cash to open an office in the Bay Area and compete for talent there, "strengthening its position at the heart of the world's leading AI ecosystem."

stories.title: Instagram用户如何阻止Meta AI使用你的照片
stories.sourceTitle: Instagram users: Here’s how to stop Meta’s AI from using your photos
stories.summary: Muse Image允许用户使用公开Instagram账户的照片生成AI图像，只要账户公开，其他人即可标记并用于AI创作，用户需主动设置隐私。
stories.analysis: 这引发了用户对数据使用的担忧，Meta需在创新与用户控制权之间寻求平衡。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Muse Image allows users to generate AI images using photos from public Instagram accounts. As long as a person's profile is public, another user can tag that account and use their images as part of an AI-generated creation.

stories.title: Meta新款AI芯片将于九月开始生产
stories.sourceTitle: Meta’s new AI chips will begin production in September
stories.summary: Meta采用模块化设计以适应AI快速发展带来的需求变化，新款AI芯片计划9月投产。
stories.analysis: Meta自研芯片可降低对NVIDIA的依赖，但量产性能和生态成熟度仍是关键考验。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The company is taking a modular approach to designing these chips, anticipating that their needs will change as AI evolves rapidly by the time the chips are in production.

stories.title: Meta称新AI模型Muse Spark 1.1在编程领域具备竞争力
stories.sourceTitle: Meta says its new AI model is ready to compete on coding
stories.summary: Meta宣布开放Muse Spark 1.1的API，允许开发者将其接入AI编程软件，声称该模型是“阶梯式改进”，在编码任务上表现突出。
stories.analysis: Meta以开源API策略吸引开发者，可能在AI编程工具市场形成对GitHub Copilot的挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: After reentering the AI race with its first in-house Muse Spark model in April, Meta is now opening up the doors to developers with a new model that can plug into AI coding software with the new Meta Model API. Meta says that Muse Spark 1.1 is a "step-change"

stories.title: Anthropic为Claude推出年度回顾功能“Claude Wrapped”
stories.sourceTitle: Say hello to Claude Wrapped
stories.summary: 受Spotify Wrapped启发，Anthropic在Claude聊天机器人中新增“reflect”功能，允许用户查看自己过去一年的使用总结。
stories.analysis: 这将增加用户粘性和社交传播，但隐私保护将是用户接受度的关键。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The popularity of Spotify Wrapped has kicked off a wide range of year-in-review features, on apps from YouTube to Uber - and now, the lookback trend has come to AI. Anthropic on Thursday announced a "reflect" feature for its Claude chatbot, allowing users to s

stories.title: FL Studio 2026将AI聊天机器人Gopher升级为助理工程师
stories.sourceTitle: FL Studio 2026 turns its AI chatbot into your assistant engineer
stories.summary: FL Studio中的AI聊天机器人Gopher从说明书助手升级为能协助创作的助理工程师，可执行更复杂的音乐制作任务。
stories.analysis: AI从工具人变为创作伙伴，可能改变数字音频工作站的用户体验，但专业性仍需提升。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Last year, Image Line introduced Gopher for FL Studio, an AI chatbot that was basically a glorified instruction manual. You asked it how to do something, and it would serve up the relevant instructions. It's the kind of thing I actually use AI for on a semi-re

stories.title: Agent进化论：从对话到协作
stories.sourceTitle: Agent 进化论：从对话到协作
stories.summary: InfoQ中文报道探讨AI Agent从简单对话向多智能体协作的演进，分析其在中国企业应用中的落地实践。
stories.analysis: 该报道反映了中国AI行业对Agent自主协作的重视，但实际工程复杂性仍是规模化障碍。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: Claude在Foundry上正式可用，但欧洲企业无法部署
stories.sourceTitle: Claude 在 Foundry 上正式可用，但欧洲企业无法部署
stories.summary: Anthropic的Claude模型在Foundry平台上线，但由于监管限制，欧洲企业尚无法使用该部署选项。
stories.analysis: 地域限制凸显了AI服务的合规挑战，欧洲企业可能需要寻找替代方案或等待本地化版本。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: 通义千问发布Qwen3Guard：Token流实时安全防护模型
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen团队推出Qwen3Guard，这是Qwen系列首个安全护栏模型，基于Qwen3微调，专门用于安全分类，可实时监控生成内容。
stories.analysis: Qwen3Guard补全了开源模型的安全短板，可能推动更多企业放心采用通义千问系列模型。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
